title: Laboratory Associate I
description: Medtronic, a leader in medical device technology, seeks a Laboratory Associate I to support biocompatibility and materials testing for cardiac and vascular devices. Working hybrid in Irvine, you'll conduct laboratory tests, prepare samples, and maintain testing equipment. This role combines hands-on laboratory work with exposure to cutting-edge medical device development.
responsibilities: Conduct biocompatibility and materials testing according to established protocols
Prepare specimens and materials for testing and analysis
Operate and maintain laboratory equipment and instruments
Record test data and maintain laboratory documentation
Assist with quality assurance checks and regulatory testing
Support senior laboratory staff and contribute to test development

requirements.education: High school diploma or Associate degree in a laboratory science field
skills: Basic chemistry and materials science knowledge

benefits: Competitive health, dental, vision, and life insurance
